race.description: Sportsbet K & H Smith Sa Fillies Classic (G3)
race.comment: PANDA'S SPECTRUM (2) is a progressive filly who has continued to improve throughout her debut preparation. She's put together back-to-back wins in impressive fashion, and her breeding suggests the rise in trip will suit. Can make it three on the bounce. BOOMEROO (1) took a significant step forward last start when narrowly beaten in the G3 Chairman's Stakes a fortnight ago. The form has already been franked, most notably with the subsequent SA Derby winner finishing 3.5 lengths behind her. The extra distance shouldn't pose any issue. SET ME FREE (8) is another promising staying type from the Hayes camp. Is trending the right way and shapes as though this longer trip will bring out further improvement. CUSHIONED (6) couldn't go with them in the Australasian Oaks, but this is a much easier assignment and she shouldn't be dismissed. SYNTHESISE (3) is yet to tackle this sort of journey but is forever running on. Will be hoping they overdo it in front.
